user.title: Broadlink AC
user.description:
Select discovered Broadlink AC devices, or add devices manually below.{manual_devices_list}
{failed_devices}

data_description.discovered_devices: Air conditioners found on the local network.
data_description.mac: MAC address with or without separators, for example 34:ea:34:f7:58:66.
data_description.add_manual_device: Open the form to enter IP and MAC address.

manual_devices_section.name: Add manually
manual_devices_section.description: Use this if your air conditioner is not in the list above.

data_description.add_manual_device: Open the form to enter IP and MAC address.

manual_device.title: Add device manually
manual_device.description: Enter the device IP address. The MAC address is optional if discovery is available on your network.

data_description.mac: MAC address with or without separators, for example 34:ea:34:f7:58:66.

manual_device_menu.title: Device added
manual_device_menu.description: The device was saved. You can add another device or continue setup.

connection_result.title: Connection test

area.title: Assign areas
area.description: Choose the area for each air conditioner.

data_description.area_id: The area where this air conditioner is located.
data_description.device_areas: Assign an area to each device.

error.mac_not_found: Could not discover the MAC address for this IP address. Enter the MAC address manually if discovery is blocked.
error.no_device_selected: Select a discovered device or add at least one manual device.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device. Check the IP address and network.

abort.already_configured: All selected devices are already configured.
